    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults that implement RestartPolicy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    NoRestartPolicy<G>
    Default restart policy that never restarts.
    final class 
    StagnationRestartPolicy<G>
    Restart policy that triggers after a fixed number of non-improving iterations.
